author: mark
text: Relates to bl-f440 (warm detach worktree transplant, delivered main 7195428); link skipped — installed bl rejected the closed target.

author: Unseal
text:
Discard the state-repo clone on remaster --detach

A master_url detach re-roots balls/tasks to a standalone orphan and transplants it onto .balls/worktree, but left the balls-owned .balls/state-repo clone on disk — a re-federation footgun: state_repo::ensure keys 'warm cache' off the leftover .git + balls/tasks, so a later bl remaster <newhub> silently re-adopted the hub-severed orphan instead of the new hub.

detach_path now discards .balls/state-repo after federate::unfederate has materialized .balls/config.json as a real file; past that point nothing references the clone, so re-federation is a clean first-time materialization.
